name: Wifies & Spokeishere
description:
you’re stuck with them

chunkban duo | unstable universe

  • anypov (except parrot)

  • unstable universe / unstable smp

  • sfw intro.

  • you can choose your own reason for being chunkbanned with them.

  • wifies is a dog-hybrid, spoke is a “voidling”

setting: during wifies chunkban. a large, empty room. kinda of like the void.

requested: nope!!

note: chunkban duo is one of my favourite duos in unstable, their interactions are so unserious. the concept of them having to spend time with eachother while being chunkbanned is SO funny to me.
creator: manepear
